reply.text: Im suing for emotional damage every time you step in a fitting room

messages.text: i just know zara security drafted a restraining order
objection, i was actually studying the shopping bag inflation rate
sure economist, zooming in on my ankles for research
the way those sneakers said olympic mall walking starter pack
you talk like the fitting room personally hurt you
you are persistent, i will give that 😭😭
respectfully, that white sweatshirt committed cozy in the first degree
you are trying me, keep going
yeah i passed the bar the moment i saw that tote bag
the bag is more stable than your arguments already
at least the bag and i both know we not getting returned
bold for someone who screams emotional damage over gray leggings
monday. i'll send you the address
